pixelToken.label: Pixel token
pixelToken.description: Unique identifier for the web pixel on whose behalf the event is being sent; 32 hex digits

apiToken.label: API token
apiToken.description: Required in order to pass GDPR deletion requests to Magellan AI

identify.title: Identify
identify.description: If you have your own identifiers for customers, Magellan AI can accept that identifier and report it back to you with other measurement data.

userId.label: User ID
userId.description: Your internal, unique identifier for the user

ip.label: IP address
ip.description: The IPv4 address of the end user (Note: Segment does not support collecting IPv6 addresses)

ua.label: User agent
ua.description: The user agent of the end user (Note: not collected by the iOS Segment agent)

view.title: View
view.description: Tracks a page view. We recommend including this on every page.

url.label: URL
url.description: The address of the page viewed

ip.label: IP address
ip.description: The IPv4 address of the end user (Note: Segment does not support collecting IPv6 addresses)

ua.label: User agent
ua.description: The user agent of the end user (Note: not collected by the iOS Segment agent)

lead.title: Lead
lead.description: Track lead generation, like signups, subscriptions, and notification requests.

value.label: Value
value.description: The monetary value of this event, in the specified currency

id.label: Lead ID
id.description: The unique ID for this generated lead

productId.label: Product ID
productId.description: The product ID associated with this lead

quantity.label: Quantity
quantity.description: The number of items represented by this lead

ip.label: IP address
ip.description: The IPv4 address of the end user (Note: Segment does not support collecting IPv6 addresses)

ua.label: User agent
ua.description: The user agent of the end user (Note: not collected by the iOS Segment agent)

product.title: Product
product.description: Indicates that a user has visited the page for a specific product or variant of a product. This event is similar to the view event, but allows you to provide more details about the product the user has seen.

value.label: Value
value.description: The monetary value of this event, in the specified currency

productId.label: Product ID
productId.description: Your unique ID for this product

productType.label: Product type
productType.description: The type or category of this product

productVendor.label: Vendor
productVendor.description: The vendor or brand for this product

variantId.label: Variant ID
variantId.description: The unique ID for this variant of the product

variantName.label: Variant name
variantName.description: The name of this variant of the product

ip.label: IP address
ip.description: The IPv4 address of the end user (Note: Segment does not support collecting IPv6 addresses)

ua.label: User agent
ua.description: The user agent of the end user (Note: not collected by the iOS Segment agent)

addToCart.title: Add to Cart
addToCart.description: This event tracks any time an object is added to the cart.

quantity.label: Quantity
quantity.description: The number of items added to the cart

value.label: Value
value.description: The monetary value of this event, in the specified currency

productId.label: Product ID
productId.description: Your unique ID for this product

productType.label: Product type
productType.description: The type or category of this product

productVendor.label: Vendor
productVendor.description: The vendor or brand for this product

variantId.label: Variant ID
variantId.description: The unique ID for this variant of the product

variantName.label: Variant name
variantName.description: The name of this variant of the product

ip.label: IP address
ip.description: The IPv4 address of the end user (Note: Segment does not support collecting IPv6 addresses)

ua.label: User agent
ua.description: The user agent of the end user (Note: not collected by the iOS Segment agent)

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.description: This event tracks when a user goes to check out, regardless of whether they complete the purchase.

value.label: Value
value.description: The monetary value of this event, in the specified currency

discountCode.label: Discount code
discountCode.description: The coupon or discount code applied to the cart

id.label: Order ID
id.description: The unique ID for the order initiated by this checkout event

quantity.label: Quantity
quantity.description: The total number of items in the cart

lineItems.label: Line items
lineItems.description: The list (array) of all products in the cart

quantity.label: Quantity
quantity.description: The number of this product in the cart

value.label: Price
value.description: The price per unit of this product

productId.label: Product ID
productId.description: Your unique ID for this product

productType.label: Product type
productType.description: The type or category of this product

productVendor.label: Vendor
productVendor.description: The vendor or brand for this product

variantId.label: Variant ID
variantId.description: The unique ID for this variant of the product

variantName.label: Variant name
variantName.description: The name of this variant of the product

ip.label: IP address
ip.description: The IPv4 address of the end user (Note: Segment does not support collecting IPv6 addresses)

ua.label: User agent
ua.description: The user agent of the end user (Note: not collected by the iOS Segment agent)

code.title: Code
code.description: Track when a user enters a discount code at checkout.

code.label: Code
code.description: The coupon or discount code applied

type.label: Type
type.description: The type of coupon or discount code used

ip.label: IP address
ip.description: The IPv4 address of the end user (Note: Segment does not support collecting IPv6 addresses)

ua.label: User agent
ua.description: The user agent of the end user (Note: not collected by the iOS Segment agent)

purchase.title: Purchase
purchase.description: Fire this event upon successful completion of a purchase.

value.label: Value
value.description: The monetary value of this event, in the specified currency

discountCode.label: Discount code
discountCode.description: The coupon or discount code applied to the cart

id.label: Order ID
id.description: The unique ID for the order initiated by this checkout event

quantity.label: Quantity
quantity.description: The total number of items in the cart

lineItems.label: Line items
lineItems.description: The list (array) of all products in the cart

quantity.label: Quantity
quantity.description: The number of this product in the cart

value.label: Price
value.description: The price per unit of this product

productId.label: Product ID
productId.description: Your unique ID for this product

productType.label: Product type
productType.description: The type or category of this product

productVendor.label: Vendor
productVendor.description: The vendor or brand for this product

variantId.label: Variant ID
variantId.description: The unique ID for this variant of the product

variantName.label: Variant name
variantName.description: The name of this variant of the product

isNewCustomer.label: New customer?
isNewCustomer.description: Whether or not this customer is a first-time buyer from your store

ip.label: IP address
ip.description: The IPv4 address of the end user (Note: Segment does not support collecting IPv6 addresses)

ua.label: User agent
ua.description: The user agent of the end user (Note: not collected by the iOS Segment agent)

install.title: Install
install.description: Fire this event to track when a user installs your mobile application. (Mobile applications only)

host.label: MMP Host
host.description: The name of the MMP platform transmitting this event to Segment (e.g., Appsflyer, Singular, etc.)

app.label: App name
app.description: The name of the mobile application

ts.label: Timestamp
ts.description: When the event occurred, in ISO 8601 format

plat.label: Mobile platform
plat.description: The mobile platform of the device (e.g., iOS, Android)

aifa.label: GAID/AIFA
aifa.description: The Google Advertising ID, on Android devices

andi.label: AID/ANDI
andi.description: The Android ID, on Android devices

idfa.label: IDFA
idfa.description: The ID for Advertising, on iOS devices

idfv.label: IDFV
idfv.description: The ID for Vendors, on iOS devices

ip.label: IP address
ip.description: The IPv4 address of the end user (Note: Segment does not support collecting IPv6 addresses)

ua.label: User agent
ua.description: The user agent of the end user (Note: not collected by the iOS Segment agent)

thirdPartyEvent.title: Custom third-party event
thirdPartyEvent.description: Fire arbitrary, custom third-party events from your mobile app. (Mobile applications only)

evtname.label: Event name
evtname.description: The name of the custom third-party event to pass to Magellan AI

evtattrs.label: Event attributes
evtattrs.description: An arbitrary JSON object containing any additional data about this event

app.label: App name
app.description: The name of the mobile application

plat.description: The mobile platform of the device (e.g., iOS, Android)

aifa.label: GAID/AIFA
aifa.description: The Google Advertising ID, on Android devices

andi.description: The Android ID, on Android devices

idfa.description: The ID for Advertising, on iOS devices

idfv.description: The ID for Vendors, on iOS devices
